name: p-hydroxybenzoic acid
description: p-hydroxybenzoic acid is a compound reported in adenostoma fasciculatum. Available source coverage remains preliminary in this dataset.
effects: Traditional uses include skin and respiratory conditions
contraindications: high doses may cause gastrointestinal upset or phototoxic reactions due to hydroquinone.
